description: Export manifest for migrating the Saudi Arabian Remittance Intelligence and Corridor Management Centre (SRCMC) platform from the integrated SariRemit workspace into an independent, dedicated AI Studio project.

required_env_variables.name: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
required_env_variables.description: Supabase anonymous API key for client-side authentication and database access.

required_env_variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
required_env_variables.description: Google Gemini API key for running automated intelligence scans, rate compliance reviews, and suspicious activity detection.

entry_points.description: SPA entry point with viewport configuration and root mounting container.
Application bootstrapper mounting React with theme and localization providers.
Global style file incorporating Tailwind CSS directives and custom SariRemit Design System (SDS) variables.

core_components.description: Unified administrative interface governing rate overrides, community submissions reviews, Brand Asset Management, policy definitions, audit logs, and fraud detection.
SDS/BAM presentational components enforcing priority fallbacks for brand assets (logos, flags, badges).
Main navigation wrapper providing secure navigation toggles for authorized admin panels.

intelligence_services.description: SariRemit Intelligence & Score (SIS) service managing dynamic metrics scoring, currency freshness, and confidence bands.
Evidence Resolution Engine (EDE) analyzing submissions, screenshot hashing, and auto-matching with community logs.
Evidence Provenance Engine (EPE) auditing log provenance, user submission consistency, and historical truth ratings.

supporting_services.description: Database broker managing all direct Supabase API transactions (overrides, submissions, audit logging, asset cataloging).
Brand Asset Resolver orchestrating asset mappings, fallback initials generation, and theme surface conversions.
Broadcaster routing real-time security alerts, admin notifications, and rate flags directly to users.
Global TypeScript type system housing strict definitions for brand assets, evidence logs, resolution models, and admin structures.

database.description: Complete PostgreSQL relational schema detailing Brand Assets (BAM), Overrides, Corridors, Audit Logs, and User Profiles.

migration_checklist: 1. Export complete repository as a ZIP archive through the AI Studio settings menu.
2. Provision a new AI Studio applet using the React + TypeScript stack.
3. Set up a Supabase PostgreSQL instance using the schema definitions in 'supabase-schema.sql'.
4. Configure environment variables in the new project UI (URL, anon key, and Gemini API key).
5. Populate 'src/components/SrcmcControl.tsx' as the primary routing view in the separated project.
6. Verify dependencies build successfully via 'npm run build'.
